subcodes.first_line: These are the days wherein all the peoples of the earth must attain unto that which was intended—glad-tidings of this Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایامی است که باید جمیع اهل ارض فائز شوند بانچه که مقصود است مژده این ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @thankfulness; gratitude
